title: The United Nations (Privileges and Immunities) Act, 1947
full_text: The United Nations (Privileges and Immunities) Act, 1947 संयुक्‍त राष्‍ट्र (विशेषाधिकर और उन्‍मुक्‍ति)अधिनियम,1947 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194746 Act Number: 46 Enactment Date: 1947-12-20 Act Year: 1947 Short Title: The United Nations (Privileges and Immunities) Act, 1947 Hindi Title: संयुक्‍त राष्‍ट्र (विशेषाधिकर और उन्‍मुक्‍ति)अधिनियम,1947 Long Title: An Act to give effect to the Convection on the Privileges and immunities of the United Nations. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 20-12-1947 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The United Nations (Privileges and Immunities) Act, 1947 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Conferment on United Nations and its representatives and officers and certain privileges and immunities. Section 3. Power to confer certain privileges and immunities on other international organisations and their representatives and officers. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Power to make rules. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
